hero.label: Studio Management, Reimagined
hero.title: Beautifully Simple Booking for Your Pilates Studio
hero.subtitle: Everything your boutique studio needs — scheduling, credit-based classes, member management, and payments — in one elegant platform.

scheduling.title: Effortless Class Scheduling
scheduling.description: Plan your week with a beautiful calendar view. Create class templates, set capacities, assign instructors — all in seconds. Your students see a clean, intuitive booking experience.

payments.title: Flexible Payment Models
payments.description: Credits, session bundles, gift cards, or complimentary sessions — configure what fits your studio. Students see their balance in real time. You have full control over every booking.

analytics.title: Studio Analytics
analytics.description: Know your community inside out. Track bookings, revenue, active students, and cancellation rates in real time. Every purchase and adjustment is logged in your activity feed.

financial.title: Financial Clarity
financial.description: No more spreadsheet juggling. Automatic invoicing, payment tracking, tax-ready reports, and a clear revenue overview — always know where your studio stands.

flexibleModels.label: Your Model, Your Rules
flexibleModels.title: We Adapt to How You Run Your Studio
flexibleModels.subtitle: Every studio is different. Some swear by credits. Others prefer simple session packages. With Pilateq, you choose what works for your community — and switch anytime.

creditSystem.title: Credit System
creditSystem.description: Students buy credits and spend them per class.

giftCards.title: Gift Cards
giftCards.description: Let your community purchase gift cards.

flexibleModels.engineLabel: Switch anytime — one engine, all models

platform.label: The Platform
platform.title: Two Views, One Seamless Experience
platform.subtitle: Your students enjoy a calm, distraction-free booking experience. You get a powerful admin dashboard with everything you need to run your studio efficiently.

pricing.label: Pricing
pricing.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
pricing.subtitle: No member limits. No hidden fees. Choose the features that fit your studio.

starter.name: Starter
starter.description: Everything to get your studio running

professional.name: Professional
professional.description: For studios that want the full package

enterprise.name: Enterprise
enterprise.explanation: The Starter and Professional plans give you instant access to our web app with a standardized setup. Enterprise is different: we adapt Pilateq to your exact requirements — custom features, specialized workflows, your branding, even installation on your own servers.

finalCta.title: Ready to Transform Your Studio?
finalCta.subtitle: Join boutique Pilates studios across Europe who trust Pilateq to run their business beautifully.

footer.tagline: Beautiful studio management for Pilates professionals.

contact.label: Get in Touch
contact.title: Start Your Free Trial
contact.subtitle: Tell us about your studio and we'll set you up with a personalized 14-day trial. No credit card required.

form.name: Your Name
form.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about your studio, how many members you have, what you're looking for...
form.error: The form could not be sent. Please try again or email us directly at info@pilateq.de.
form.disclaimer: No credit card required. 14-day free trial.

nextSteps.title: What happens next?
steps: We review your message within 24 hours
You receive access to your trial account
We schedule a quick onboarding call
You start managing your studio beautifully

success.title: Message Sent!
success.message: Thank you for reaching out. We'll get back to you within 24 hours with your trial access.

vat.title: VAT ID
vat.text: VAT identification number pursuant to § 27a UStG

dispute.title: Dispute resolution
dispute.text: The European Commission provides a platform for online dispute resolution (ODR):

privacy.dataControllerText: The data controller within the meaning of the GDPR is Pilateq, Stuttgart, Germany. Email: info@pilateq.de
privacy.dataCollectedText: When you use Pilateq, we process account data (name, email), studio data (business name, address, schedules), member data (names and contacts entered by you), booking data (registrations, credit balances, payments), and usage data (login times, feature usage).
privacy.purposeText: We process your data solely to provide and improve the Pilateq booking and management platform. We do not sell your data to third parties.
privacy.legalBasisText: The legal basis for processing is Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR (contractual necessity) for providing our service, and Art. 6(1)(a) GDPR (consent) for marketing communications where applicable.
privacy.storageText: Your data is stored on secure servers within the European Union. We implement industry-standard encryption (TLS/SSL) for data transmission and at-rest encryption for stored data.
privacy.rightsText: Under the GDPR, you have the right to access, rectify, erase, restrict, port, and object to processing of your personal data. Contact us at info@pilateq.de to exercise these rights.
privacy.cookiesText: Pilateq uses only essential cookies necessary for the operation of the platform (session management, authentication). We do not use tracking or advertising cookies.
privacy.changesText: We may update this privacy policy from time to time. We will notify you of any significant changes via email or through the platform.

about.journey1Text: Before my studies, I spent almost a year in Chile and Peru. This time sharpened my perspective: I experienced first-hand how strongly digital dependencies shape countries and companies.
about.journey2Text: I completed my studies in Mobile Media at Stuttgart Media University with a bachelor's thesis on IoT electromobility — grade 1.3. From user interviews through card sorting to validation, I carried out the entire process independently.
about.journey3Title: IT Solution Designer & Digital Project Manager
about.journey3Text: Since 2024, I have been working as an IT Solution Designer & Digital Project Manager at DHBW Presidium. I lead digitalization projects for various departments and drive the development of campus management systems forward.
about.skill1Desc: User interviews, card sorting, UEQ, think-aloud — from analysis to validated solution.
about.skill2Desc: Vue, Nuxt, TypeScript, Tailwind. I speak the language of developers and build what I design.
about.skill3Desc: Backlog maintenance, stakeholder management, requirements engineering in agile teams.
about.skill4Desc: Figma and Framer for interactive prototypes that make ideas tangible — before the first line of code is written.
about.ctaText: Want to know more? Let's talk about your studio.
about.philosophyIntro: I'm a one-person team. No agency, no co-founder — just me, working independently with a clear vision: creating software that truly fits the people who use it. Every line of code, every design decision, every feature is shaped by the belief that boutique studios deserve tools as individual as they are.
about.phi1Text: From user interviews to think-aloud tests — every feature is validated with real studio owners before it becomes code.
about.phi2Text: No forced templates. Every studio gets the flexibility to configure credits, sessions, and rules exactly as they need them.
about.phi3Text: I develop Pilateq independently, but I'm deeply connected to the community. Feedback flows directly into the product.
about.phi4Text: Attention to detail in design, performance, and user experience — because your studio management should feel effortless.
